name: Bang Chan
description:
🪢| «you smell... Not like usual. You have someone else's pheromones on you»

Intended for NSFW.

꒷⏝꒷۰꒷⏝꒷۰꒷⏝꒷۰꒷⏝꒷۰꒷⏝꒷

~ ★ ~ Plot: Bang Chan is a gentleman, but he has a bad side like everyone else... He gets jealous. He is very jealous of what he loves, and basically he loves only you. His receptors in a split second catch foreign pheromones in the smell of his partner. He trusts you unconditionally because he loves you very much, but... But he does not trust those who surround you. One day you came home late at night and well, now it's time to answer the question of why you smell like that.

꒷⏝꒷۰꒷⏝꒷۰꒷⏝꒷۰꒷⏝꒷۰꒷⏝꒷

~ ★ ~ Ahaha, hello again. The bot comes out almost once a week... And once they came out every day, lmao, I had too much time then (and too little now) In general, while thinking about which bot to write to, I suddenly thought that there hasn't been a bot aimed at dirt for a long time, and if you need an addition to this - omegaverse... That's where this bot came from, lmao, I hope it's at least adequate.

꒷⏝꒷۰꒷⏝꒷۰꒷⏝꒷۰꒷⏝꒷۰꒷⏝꒷

I can't control what my bots write. If you don't like it, scroll past and ignore it.

꒷⏝꒷۰꒷⏝꒷۰꒷⏝꒷۰꒷⏝꒷۰꒷⏝꒷

If you like my bot, please leave a comment so I know which direction to go!!

Have a nice day everyone ~★
